schoolPage.client.eventAutoCalendar.pt: 📅 Este item será adicionado ao calendário automaticamente.
schoolPage.client.eventAutoCalendar.en: 📅 This item will be added to the calendar automatically.
schoolPage.client.eventAutoCalendar.es: 📅 Este elemento se añadirá automáticamente al calendario.
schoolPage.client.eventAutoCalendar.fr: 📅 Cet élément sera ajouté automatiquement au calendrier.
schoolPage.client.eventAutoCalendar.de: 📅 Dieser Eintrag wird automatisch in den Kalender übernommen.

schoolPage.client.editAppearsNewDate.pt: 📅 Aparece no calendário na nova data
schoolPage.client.editAppearsNewDate.en: 📅 Appears in the calendar on the new date
schoolPage.client.editAppearsNewDate.es: 📅 Aparece en el calendario en la nueva fecha
schoolPage.client.editAppearsNewDate.fr: 📅 Apparaît dans le calendrier à la nouvelle date
schoolPage.client.editAppearsNewDate.de: 📅 Erscheint im Kalender am neuen Datum

schoolPage.client.editRemovedFromCalenda.pt: ⚠️ Vai ser removido do calendário (virou um registro).
schoolPage.client.editRemovedFromCalenda.en: ⚠️ Will be removed from the calendar (becomes a log entry).
schoolPage.client.editRemovedFromCalenda.es: ⚠️ Se eliminará del calendario (se vuelve un registro).
schoolPage.client.editRemovedFromCalenda.fr: ⚠️ Sera retiré du calendrier (devient un enregistrement).
schoolPage.client.editRemovedFromCalenda.de: ⚠️ Wird aus dem Kalender entfernt (wird ein Eintrag).
